content: GitHub Actions CI pipeline for Laravel Docker: (1) Current CI runs composer validate, npm ci, npm run build, and php artisan test with SQLite. Missing: Docker build validation, Pint code style, composer audit security scan. (2) Add 'docker build' step to validate Dockerfile builds successfully. (3) Add vendor/bin/pint --test step (test mode - fails on violations without modifying files). (4) Add composer audit step to scan composer.lock for known CVEs. (5) Optional: Trivy container image scan for CRITICAL/HIGH vulnerabilities. (6) Optional: Hadolint Dockerfile linting. (7) Keep tests using SQLite for speed (no MySQL service needed in CI). (8) Consider caching composer and npm dependencies in CI for faster runs.
